name: Chocolate Covered Toffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and remove it from heat.
2. Add sugar to the melted butter, stirring well to combine.
3. Return the mixture to heat and continue stirring until it reaches boiling point.
4. Add water and corn syrup, cooking until the temperature reaches 290°F (143°C).
5. Stir in the chopped nuts and pour onto a well-greased cookie sheet.
6. Melt the Hershey bars and spread them on top of the toffee mixture.
7. Allow the toffee to cool completely before cutting into squares.
8. Store the chocolate-covered toffee in a tightly covered container.
